name: democratic_legitimacy
description: Measures the degree to which respondents value, trust, and are satisfied with democracy as a system of government in Mexico, capturing both normative commitment to democracy and evaluations of its actual functioning.

name: institutional_trust_and_efficacy
description: Captures respondents' trust in key political and social institutions and their belief in citizens' capacity to influence government decisions, reflecting both external political efficacy and institutional confidence.

name: civic_and_political_participation
description: Measures the extent and forms of respondents' engagement in political and civic life, including voting behavior, community organizing, and attitudes toward participation as a meaningful activity.

name: political_interest_and_engagement
description: Assesses respondents' subjective interest in politics, frequency of political media consumption, perceived relevance of politics to daily life, and ideological self-placement, reflecting the cognitive and affective dimensions of political engagement.

name: authoritarian_versus_democratic_values
description: Captures respondents' underlying value orientations regarding rule of law, individual freedoms versus security, tolerance for extralegal action, and preference for strong leadership over institutional constraints, reflecting the authoritarian-democratic value dimension.
